summaryInstruction: Structured summary for summary.md (ten sections). Default template ships with the skill; customize per project in Setup.
extendedAbstractInstruction: Expert-level extended abstract: reconstruct the paper from the journal abstract plus full paper text (900–1200 words, anti-summarization rules, inline citations). Default template ships with the skill; customize per project in Setup.
followUpQuestionsInstruction: Generate depth/breadth questions from extended abstract + summary only (not full paper). Default template ships with the skill.
